meta.title: VidFab - AI Story-to-Video Workflow | Professional AI Video Creation
meta.description: Turn your scripts into high-retention episodic videos with VidFab's fully automated AI pipeline—from idea to storyboard to final render.

hero.subtitle: Stop manually editing and start scaling. Turn your scripts into high-retention, 60-second episodic videos with a fully automated pipeline—from
hero.subtitleBold: idea to storyboard to final render.
hero.cta: Start My First Series for Free
hero.trust: No credit card required. Join 10k+ digital creators.

script.title: From Any Spark to a Ready-to-Shoot Script
script.subtitle: Our workflow meets you where you are. Whether you're staring at a blank page or a viral reference, VidFab automates the heavy lifting.

cards.title: The Outliner – "I have an outline"
cards.description: Paste your rough ideas or a basic plot. Our AI structures them into high-stakes scripts with a strong hook, tight pacing, and a viral payoff.

cards.title: The Curator – "I have a reference video"
cards.description: Drop a link from YouTube Shorts. VidFab deconstructs the successful rhythm and generates an original script with a proven viral flow in your unique voice.

cards.title: The Spark – "I need a fresh idea"
cards.description: Let VidFab's brainstormer pitch you 5 episodic concepts based on your niche. Pick the best one and expand it into a full script instantly.

workspace.title: A Visual Workspace Built for Batch Production
workspace.subtitle: Don't just make a video—build a series. Master our seamless interface designed for high-volume content creation.

tabs.title: Identity Lock
tabs.description: Define your cast once. VidFab keeps your characters consistent in every frame, ensuring your audience never loses the plot.

tabs.title: AI Directing
tabs.description: Automatically convert scripts into shot-by-shot storyboards. Visualize composition and camera angles before you generate.

tabs.title: Shot Previews
tabs.description: Transform storyboards into instant motion-previews. Check the pacing in real-time and fine-tune any shot until the rhythm hits perfectly.

tabs.title: Final Assembly
tabs.description: Combine all your scenes into a polished video. Download your masterpiece in seconds, perfectly formatted for TikTok, Reels, or Shorts.

tools.title: Text to Video
tools.description: The industry-leading engine for generating high-fidelity cinematic clips from simple text descriptions.

tools.title: Image to Video
tools.description: Bring your character designs and concept stills to life with professional, fluid motion.

tools.title: Text to Image
tools.description: Generate consistent characters, stunning backgrounds, and unique assets from scratch in seconds.

tools.title: Image to Image
tools.description: Reimagine your assets, swap visual styles, or transform rough sketches into polished masterpieces.

tools.title: AI Video Effects
tools.description: Elevate your footage with trending AI visual effects. Apply cinematic filters and surreal transformations in a single click.

engineered.title: Engineered for Social Growth
engineered.subtitle: Technical specs designed to help you bypass the algorithm and reach more viewers.

items.title: Multi-Platform Ratios
items.description: Native 9:16 (Vertical) for TikTok/Reels/Shorts and 16:9 for YouTube/Web.

items.title: Retention-Optimized
items.description: Duration templates (15-60s) precision-structured to keep viewers watching until the end.

items.title: Granular Control
items.description: You're the Director. Swap storyboards or fine-tune individual video segments to match your exact vision.

items.title: Mobile-HD Exports
items.description: Crisp 720p high-definition output, optimized for blazing-fast uploads and crystal-clear mobile viewing.

items.quote: From 20 hours of editing to 20 minutes of 'VidFabbing'. The character consistency is a total game-changer for my YouTube Shorts.
items.author: Alex R.

items.quote: Finally, a tool that understands the rhythm of social media. I've grown 40k followers in two months.
items.author: Sarah T.

cards.title: Produce Episodes 10x Faster
cards.normalText: Don't let editing burn you out. Our AI story-to-video workflow handles the heavy lifting,
cards.boldText: turning days of work into minutes of creativity.

cards.title: Studio Quality, Solo Budget
cards.normalText: Replace expensive freelancers and bloated toolstacks. VidFab is your writer, illustrator, and editor—all in one browser tab.

cards.title: Excellent Character Consistency
cards.normalText: Build a recognizable universe. Our engine ensures your characters and visual style remain identical across
cards.boldText: every single episode of your series.
